Paper accepted at JRSSA

On the Interplay of Regional Mobility, Social Connectedness, and the Spread of COVID-19 in Germany

My paper * On the Interplay of Regional Mobility, Social Connectedness, and the Spread of COVID-19 in Germany * with Göran Kauermann was just accepted in the Journal of the Royal Statistical Society, Series A. The paper is available online here.

Updated: September 01, 2021
